defects.title: Next.js 15 Async Route Params
defects.description: 4 dynamic API routes used synchronous params instead of Promise<params>. Required await.

defects.title: Product Image URL Type Mismatch
defects.description: Cart route referenced product.image_url but Product type uses images: string[]

defects.title: Cart/Checkout State Isolation
defects.description: Cart and checkout routes had separate in-memory maps. Checkout always saw empty cart.

defects.title: OrderStatus Missing Values
defects.description: OrderStatus union type missing 'in_transit' and 'completed' statuses used in mock data.
